title: justicia divaricata
intro: Justicia divaricata, also known as the Divaricate Justicia or Kalmegh, is a tropical plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Justicia divaricata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a popular remedy in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion, and is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas.
